tagged_types.name: DeviceSubclass
tagged_types.code:
TYPE DeviceSubclass IS NEW Accelerometer.InputInterface AND
  Gyroscope.InputInterface AND
  Magnetometer.InputInterface AND
  Temperature.InputInterface WITH PRIVATE;

subprograms.name: Create
Get
subprograms.code: FUNCTION Get(Self : IN OUT DeviceSubclass) RETURN Accelerometer.Vector

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code: FUNCTION Get(Self : IN OUT DeviceSubclass) RETURN Gyroscope.Vector

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code: FUNCTION Get(Self : IN OUT DeviceSubclass) RETURN Magnetometer.Vector

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code: FUNCTION Get(Self : IN OUT DeviceSubclass) RETURN Temperature.Celsius
